Source

Cookie Policy

Last updated: July 2026

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, mobile phone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide useful information to website owners.

Types of Cookies We Use

1. Essential/Functional Cookies

Purpose: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly.

Cookie Name Purpose Duration
json-formatter-pro Stores user preferences (theme, indentation) and last input Until cleared

2. Analytics Cookies

Purpose: Help us understand how visitors use the website and improve performance.

Provider Purpose Duration
Cloudflare Web Analytics Aggregate page view counts (cookieless) Not applicable

3. Advertising Cookies

Purpose: Display relevant advertisements and measure advertising effectiveness.

Provider Purpose Duration
Google AdSense Serve personalized ads, measure campaign performance 13 months
Google Analytics Track user behavior for advertising insights 13 months

How We Use Cookie Information

  • Functionality: Remember your preferences and settings
  • Analytics: Understand visitor behavior and improve the website
  • Advertising: Display relevant ads and measure their performance
  • Security: Detect and prevent fraud and abuse

Your Cookie Choices

Browser Settings

Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or alert you when cookies are being sent. You can typically find cookie controls in your browser's settings under "Privacy" or "Security". Here are links to manage cookies in popular browsers:

  • Google Chrome
  • Mozilla Firefox
  • Apple Safari
  • Microsoft Edge

Opt-Out of Advertising Cookies

You can opt out of personalized advertising by:

  • Visiting Google Ads Settings
  • Enabling "Do Not Track" in your browser
  • Using an ad blocker or privacy extension

Clear Cookies

You can clear cookies stored by JSON Formatter Pro:

  • Manually clear your browser cache and cookies
  • Use your browser's "Clear Browsing Data" or "Clear Cache" function
  • Note: Clearing cookies will reset your preferences and last input

Third-Party Cookies

Google AdSense and Google Analytics set cookies on your device when you visit JSON Formatter Pro. These are "third-party" cookies because they are set by domains other than json-formatter-pro.com.

Third-party cookie providers:

  • Google: Privacy Policy and Terms
  • Cloudflare: Privacy Policy

Do Not Track (DNT)

Some browsers include a "Do Not Track" (DNT) feature. JSON Formatter Pro currently does not respond to DNT signals, but respecting your privacy remains important to us. We recommend using your browser's privacy settings for cookie control.

Policy Updates

We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to this page. Your continued use of JSON Formatter Pro following the posting of revised Cookie Policy means you accept and agree to the changes.

Questions?

If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us or email hashcode.dev@gmail.com.

© 2026 JSON Formatter Pro. All rights reserved. Everything runs in your browser — no data is sent to a server.

About FAQ Accessibility Privacy Terms Contact Cookies
